hero.title: Trusted industrial spare parts supplier for factories and maintenance operations
hero.description: We supply bearings, filtration products, and industrial spare parts from trusted brands, with responsive quotation support and sourcing assistance for procurement and maintenance teams.
hero.secondaryNote: Support for part number search, brand reference, and industrial sourcing requirements

brands.title: Trusted Brands
brands.description: We work with recognized industrial brands and present them in a clean, professional layout that is easy to scan and trust.

items.donaldson: Filtration solutions for engines, industrial systems, and heavy-duty equipment.
items.mann: High-quality filters for automotive, industrial, and maintenance applications.
items.ntn: Precision bearings for industrial and rotating equipment applications.

products.title: Featured Products
products.description: A clean product grid designed to help buyers quickly review brand, product type, and key specifications.
products.empty: No featured products available at the moment.

applications.title: Industry Applications
applications.description: We support sourcing requirements for maintenance teams, factories, machinery service, and heavy equipment operations.

factory.title: Factory Maintenance
factory.description: Support for routine replacement parts and preventive maintenance requirements.

machinery.title: Industrial Machinery
machinery.description: Suitable for rotating equipment, filtration systems, and machine service workflows.

heavyDuty.title: Heavy-Duty Equipment
heavyDuty.description: Parts support for demanding environments and industrial field operations.

procurement.title: Procurement Support
procurement.description: Fast quotation workflow for purchasing and sourcing teams.

whyUs.title: Why Choose MRT Supplier
whyUs.description: We focus on clear communication, trusted products, and responsive service for industrial customers.

trusted.title: Trusted Industrial Brands
trusted.description: We prioritize recognized brands that are widely used in industrial environments.

response.title: Responsive Quotation Support
response.description: We help customers move faster with clear RFQ handling and follow-up.

clean.title: Clear Product Presentation
clean.description: Products are presented in a clean format so buyers can scan information quickly.

b2b.title: Built for B2B Workflows
b2b.description: Suitable for factory buyers, maintenance teams, and procurement departments.

quoteSection.title: Ready to support your industrial sourcing needs
quoteSection.description: Send us your part number, current brand, machine model, or product requirement. Our team will review the details and respond with suitable options.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: For quotation requests, sourcing support, or product inquiries, please contact our team.

searchSection.title: Search by part number or product type
searchSection.description: Use part number, brand, or product keywords to quickly find relevant industrial spare parts.
searchSection.placeholder: Enter part number, brand, or product keyword

rfq.title: Request for Quote
rfq.description: Submit your requirement and our team will contact you as soon as possible.

rfq.success: Your request has been submitted successfully.

footer.description: Industrial spare parts sourcing for factories, maintenance teams, and procurement departments.
